arabicText: وَٱلذَّٰرِيَٰتِ ذَرْوًۭا
translationText: By the spreaders spreading.

arabicText: فَٱلْحَٰمِلَٰتِ وِقْرًۭا
translationText: And those carrying loads.

arabicText: فَٱلْجَٰرِيَٰتِ يُسْرًۭا
translationText: And those moving gently.

arabicText: فَٱلْمُقَسِّمَٰتِ أَمْرًا
translationText: And those distributing as commanded.

arabicText: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَصَادِقٌۭ
translationText: What you are promised is true.

arabicText: وَإِنَّ ٱلدِّينَ لَوَٰقِعٌۭ
translationText: Judgment will take place.

arabicText: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلْحُبُكِ
translationText: By the sky that is woven.

arabicText: إِنَّكُمْ لَفِى قَوْلٍۢ مُّخْتَلِفٍۢ
translationText: You differ in what you say.

arabicText: يُؤْفَكُ عَنْهُ مَنْ أُفِكَ
translationText: Averted from it is he who is averted.

arabicText: قُتِلَ ٱلْخَرَّٰصُونَ
translationText: Perish the imposters.

arabicText: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى غَمْرَةٍۢ سَاهُونَ
translationText: Those who are dazed in ignorance.

arabicText: يَسْـَٔلُونَ أَيَّانَ يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
translationText: They ask, "When is the Day of Judgment?"

arabicText: يَوْمَ هُمْ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ يُفْتَنُونَ
translationText: The Day they are presented to the Fire.

arabicText: ذُوقُوا۟ فِتْنَتَكُمْ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
translationText: "Taste your ordeal. This is what you used to challenge."

arabicText: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّٰتٍۢ وَعُيُونٍ
translationText: But the pious are amidst gardens and springs.

arabicText: ءَاخِذِينَ مَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَبْلَ ذَٰلِكَ مُحْسِنِينَ
translationText: Receiving what their Lord has given them. They were virtuous before that.

arabicText: كَانُوا۟ قَلِيلًۭا مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ مَا يَهْجَعُونَ
translationText: They used to sleep a little at night.

arabicText: وَبِٱلْأَسْحَارِ هُمْ يَسْتَغْفِرُونَ
translationText: And at dawn, they would pray for pardon.

arabicText: وَفِىٓ أَمْوَٰلِهِمْ حَقٌّۭ لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَٱلْمَحْرُومِ
translationText: And in their wealth, there was a share for the beggar and the deprived.

arabicText: وَفِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ءَايَٰتٌۭ لِّلْمُوقِنِينَ
translationText: And on earth are signs for the convinced.

arabicText: وَفِىٓ أَنفُسِكُمْ ۚ أَفَلَا تُبْصِرُونَ
translationText: And within yourselves. Do you not see?

arabicText: وَفِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ رِزْقُكُمْ وَمَا تُوعَدُونَ
translationText: And in the heaven is your livelihood, and what you are promised.

arabicText: فَوَرَبِّ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِنَّهُۥ لَحَقٌّۭ مِّثْلَ مَآ أَنَّكُمْ تَنطِقُونَ
translationText: By the Lord of the heaven and the earth, it is as true as the fact that you speak.

arabicText: هَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ضَيْفِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ ٱلْمُكْرَمِينَ
translationText: Has the story of Abraham's honorable guests reached you?

arabicText: إِذْ دَخَلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِ فَقَالُوا۟ سَلَٰمًۭا ۖ قَالَ سَلَٰمٌۭ قَوْمٌۭ مُّنكَرُونَ
translationText: When they entered upon him, they said, "Peace." He said, "Peace, strangers."

arabicText: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ فَجَآءَ بِعِجْلٍۢ سَمِينٍۢ
translationText: Then he slipped away to his family, and brought a fatted calf.

arabicText: فَقَرَّبَهُۥٓ إِلَيْهِمْ قَالَ أَلَا تَأْكُلُونَ
translationText: He set it before them. He said, "Will you not eat?"

arabicText: فَأَوْجَسَ مِنْهُمْ خِيفَةًۭ ۖ قَالُوا۟ لَا تَخَفْ ۖ وَبَشَّرُوهُ بِغُلَٰمٍ عَلِيمٍۢ
translationText: And he harbored fear of them. They said, "Do not fear," and they announced to him the good news of a knowledgeable boy.

arabicText: فَأَقْبَلَتِ ٱمْرَأَتُهُۥ فِى صَرَّةٍۢ فَصَكَّتْ وَجْهَهَا وَقَالَتْ عَجُوزٌ عَقِيمٌۭ
translationText: His wife came forward crying. She clasped her face, and said, "A barren old woman?"

arabicText: قَالُوا۟ كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْحَكِيمُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
translationText: They said, "Thus spoke your Lord. He is the Wise, the Knowing."

arabicText: ۞ قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكُمْ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
translationText: He said, "What is your business, O envoys?"

arabicText: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ أُرْسِلْنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوْمٍۢ مُّجْرِمِينَ
translationText: They said, "We are sent to a people guilty of sin."

arabicText: لِنُرْسِلَ عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةًۭ مِّن طِينٍۢ
translationText: "To unleash upon them rocks of clay."

arabicText: مُّسَوَّمَةً عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلْمُسْرِفِينَ
translationText: "Marked by your Lord for the excessive."

arabicText: فَأَخْرَجْنَا مَن كَانَ فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
translationText: We evacuated all the believers who were in it.

arabicText: فَمَا وَجَدْنَا فِيهَا غَيْرَ بَيْتٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
translationText: But found in it only one household of Muslims.

arabicText: وَتَرَكْنَا فِيهَآ ءَايَةًۭ لِّلَّذِينَ يَخَافُونَ ٱلْعَذَابَ ٱلْأَلِيمَ
translationText: And We left in it a sign for those who fear the painful punishment.

arabicText: وَفِى مُوسَىٰٓ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَٰهُ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ بِسُلْطَٰنٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ
translationText: And in Moses. We sent him to Pharaoh with a clear authority.

arabicText: فَتَوَلَّىٰ بِرُكْنِهِۦ وَقَالَ سَٰحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌۭ
translationText: But he turned away with his warlords, and said, "A sorcerer or a madman."

arabicText: فَأَخَذْنَٰهُ وَجُنُودَهُۥ فَنَبَذْنَٰهُمْ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ وَهُوَ مُلِيمٌۭ
translationText: So We seized him and his troops, and threw them into the sea, and He was to blame.

arabicText: وَفِى عَادٍ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلرِّيحَ ٱلْعَقِيمَ
translationText: And in Aad. We unleashed against them the devastating wind.

arabicText: مَا تَذَرُ مِن شَىْءٍ أَتَتْ عَلَيْهِ إِلَّا جَعَلَتْهُ كَٱلرَّمِيمِ
translationText: It spared nothing it came upon, but rendered it like decayed ruins.

arabicText: وَفِى ثَمُودَ إِذْ قِيلَ لَهُمْ تَمَتَّعُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍۢ
translationText: And in Thamood. They were told, "Enjoy yourselves for a while."

arabicText: فَعَتَوْا۟ عَنْ أَمْرِ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّٰعِقَةُ وَهُمْ يَنظُرُونَ
translationText: But they defied the command of their Lord, so the lightning struck them as they looked on.

arabicText: فَمَا ٱسْتَطَٰعُوا۟ مِن قِيَامٍۢ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُنتَصِرِينَ
translationText: They could not rise up, nor could they find help.

arabicText: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍۢ مِّن قَبْلُ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًۭا فَٰسِقِينَ
translationText: And before that, the people of Noah. They were immoral people.

arabicText: وَٱلسَّمَآءَ بَنَيْنَٰهَا بِأَيْي۟دٍۢ وَإِنَّا لَمُوسِعُونَ
translationText: We constructed the universe with power, and We are expanding it.

arabicText: وَٱلْأَرْضَ فَرَشْنَٰهَا فَنِعْمَ ٱلْمَٰهِدُونَ
translationText: And the earth-We spread it out-How well We prepared it!

arabicText: وَمِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَا زَوْجَيْنِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ
translationText: We created all things in pairs, so that you may reflect and ponder.

arabicText: فَفِرُّوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
translationText: "So flee towards God. I am to you from Him a clear warner."

arabicText: وَلَا تَجْعَلُوا۟ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
translationText: "And do not set up any other god with God. I am to you from Him a clear warner."

arabicText: كَذَٰلِكَ مَآ أَتَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا قَالُوا۟ سَاحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ
translationText: Likewise, no messenger came to those before them, but they said, "A sorcerer or a madman."

arabicText: أَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِهِۦ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ قَوْمٌۭ طَاغُونَ
translationText: Did they recommend it to one another? In fact, they are rebellious people.

arabicText: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِمَلُومٍۢ
translationText: So turn away from them; you are not to blame.

arabicText: وَذَكِّرْ فَإِنَّ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ تَنفَعُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
translationText: And remind, for the reminder benefits the believers.

arabicText: وَمَا خَلَقْتُ ٱلْجِنَّ وَٱلْإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُونِ
translationText: I did not create the jinn and the humans except to worship Me.

arabicText: مَآ أُرِيدُ مِنْهُم مِّن رِّزْقٍۢ وَمَآ أُرِيدُ أَن يُطْعِمُونِ
translationText: I need no livelihood from them, nor do I need them to feed Me.

arabicText: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلرَّزَّاقُ ذُو ٱلْقُوَّةِ ٱلْمَتِينُ
translationText: God is the Provider, the One with Power, the Strong.

arabicText: فَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ ذَنُوبًۭا مِّثْلَ ذَنُوبِ أَصْحَٰبِهِمْ فَلَا يَسْتَعْجِلُونِ
translationText: Those who do wrong will have their turn, like the turn of their counterparts, so let them not rush Me.

arabicText: فَوَيْلٌۭ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن يَوْمِهِمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ
translationText: So woe to those who disbelieve because of that Day of theirs which they are promised.
